title: Ambulances set ablaze at London synagogue in attack Starmer calls antisemitic
summary_full: No one was hurt in the blaze, which damaged four ambulances operated by a Jewish charity in north London’s Golders Green neighborhood, officials said.
summary_public: No one was hurt in the blaze, which damaged four ambulances operated by a Jewish charity in north London’s Golders Green neighborhood, officials said.

GB.label: negative
